generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on others for our defense? Those days are over. Our strategic autonomy isn't just about strength—it's about ensuring our civil liberties stay intact. Foreign allies have their own interests. We've seen how quickly things can change. Let's not wait for another crisis to act. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
